+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+    "title": "gitea: Contributors graph",
+    "description": "Contributors graph. Requested by 60+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current gitea setup",
+        "description": "Verify your gitea version and configuration:
```bash
gitea --version
```
This feature requires a working gitea installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review gitea configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant gitea configuration:
Implement contributor graphs: https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/graphs/contributors

<bountysource-plugin>

---
Want to back this issue? **[Post a bounty on"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Contributors graph",
+        "description": "**Let's start by taking apart existing solutions to identify required data and possible data structure.**

# GitHub

API endpoint for contibutions data is `https://github.com/<owner>/<repo>/graphs/contributors-data`.

The returned JSON data is basically a list of objects (each representing one
```yaml
[
  { ... }, // User with least contributions
    ...
  { ... }, // User with second most contributions
  { ... }  // User with most contributions
]
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Contributors graph" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "**Let's start by taking apart existing solutions to identify required data and possible data structure.**

# GitHub

API endpoint for contibutions data is `https://github.com/<owner>/<repo>/graphs/contributors-data`.

The returned JSON data is basically a list of objects (each representing one contributor) sorted least contributions first, most contributions last:
```
[
  { ...",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "[
  { ... }, // User with least contributions
    ...
  { ... }, // User with second most contributions
  { ... }  // User with most contributions
]",
+        "{
  "author": {
    "id": 12345,
    "login": "octocat",
    "avatar": "https://avatars3.githubusercontent.com/u/12345?s=60&v=4",
    "path": "/octocat",
    "hovercard_url": "/hovercards?user_id=12345"
  },
  "total": 123,
  "weeks": [
    // First week in which the repo existed
    {
      "w": 1391904000,
      "a": 6898,
      "d": 77,
      "c": 10
    },
    // Second week in which the repo existed
    {
      "w": 1392508800,
      "a": 2437,
      "d": 439,
      "c": 6
    },
    ...
    // Current week
    {
      "w": 1538265600,
      "a": 0,
      "d": 0,
      "c": 0
    }
  ]
}",
+        "[
  { ... }, // Latest commit
  { ... }, // Second latest commit
    ...
  { ... }, // First commit
]"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "gitea",
+      "community",
+      "git-hosting",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "gitea"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/issues/847",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea"
+    },
+    "reactions": 60,
+    "comments": 49,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "docker",
+      "git"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working gitea installation or development environment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-02T06:59:22.095Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,

+  }
